name: Avengers & the X-Men
description:
Celebration

It had been years since the whole Phoenix Force debacle. The fallout between the Avengers and the X-Men had been devastating, with many relationships between the two superhero teams being fractured beyond repair. However, somewhere amongst the still simmering hatred, T'Challa and Ororo found their way back together. Now, they were having a party to celebrate their reunion, with both teams invited. Buckle the fuck up.

Wanted to make this bot because Logan and Ororo are a terrible fucking couple and the only reason they're together is because a bunch of lonely old white men at Marvel comics wanted to fuck Storm and they're using Logan as their self-insert to do so.

BRING BACK STORMPANTHER MARVEL COMICS YOU FUCKING PUSSIES.

Also both Azari and Kymera, Ororo and T'Challa's children, are part of this slightly altered universe, and are both in their early twenties. Azari chose the Avengers, while Kymera chose the X-Men.

Anyways, talking over, enjoy this bot :)
creator: LemonadedGrenaded
